arts.ttl: GIAN PIERO GASPERINI PHILADELPHIA COACH OF THE MONTH FOR NOVEMBER
arts.sum: The Philadelphia Coach Of The Month award for November has been assigned to Atalanta coach Gian Piero Gasperini . "The month of November for Gasperini`s Atalanta was simply perfect, with four victories out of four matches, including the 3-0 win away to Napoli and the success in Rome - said Lega Serie A CEO Luigi De Siervo -.

arts.ttl: Sacchi: “Atalanta are running strong – Milan will have to play as a group against them”
arts.sum: Arrigo Sacchi previewed the upcoming clash between Atalanta and AC Milan, anticipating an open and courageous match between two teams that will face each other without fear or tension. arts.sum: Milan visit Atalanta at the Gewiss Stadium this evening, with top Serie A goalscorer Mateo...

Atalanta and Milan have drawn 45 of their 126 Serie A matches, with 26 Nerazzurri wins and 55 Rossoneri victories completing the tally; against no other team have the Bergamo club recorded more draws in the competition (45 also against Juventus). Atalanta won their last league match at the Gewiss Stadium against Milan (3-2 on 9 December 2023) and have only once achieved two consecutive home wins against the Rossoneri in Serie A: between November 2006 and January 2008.
